pages.stake.native_shuffle_explanation: Validators are randomly shuffled to promote decentralization. This helps prevent bias toward larger validators, ensuring fairer distribution of stake across the network. Of course, you're free to choose any validator you want, but having few validators with large concentration of stake makes the network less secure.
